calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-01-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Peter Bisno, Esq. for Plaintiff: Colusa International Commodities, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Joe Wallace was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Distralsa, Inc., a California Corporation and Giuliana Pasquale as follows:
Damages $123,403.88
Prejudgment Interest $22,347.22
Costs $1,174.47, for a total of $146,925.57
Judgment signed in open court.
